name: user_id
description: Which person this activity belongs to

name: activity_id
description: Garmin's unique activityId; used as the idempotency key for re-syncs

name: activity_type
description: Garmin activity type key, e.g. walking, running, strength_training

name: distance_m
description: Distance covered in meters, when applicable

name: calories
description: Estimated calories burned during the activity

name: avg_hr
description: Average heart rate during the activity

name: max_hr
description: Max heart rate during the activity
